definitions: In an attempt or effort to address or deal with a problem or challenge.
With the aim of confronting or resolving an issue.
examples: The government introduced new policies in a bid to tackle inflation.
The company launched a campaign in a bid to tackle declining sales.
Scientists are working on new technologies in a bid to tackle climate change.
